kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan in Eastcheap's levy is lower than both Cedric and the Carpenter.
Either Cedric belongs to the South Side or both members of the Ironmongers' Guild belong to the South Side.
8 coins goes with exactly two of Aldric, Blacksmith, and Southgate.
If Aldric does not go with 10 coins, then 8 coins goes with Carpenter.
Kingsford goes with exactly two of Edmund, Carpenter, and 14 coins.
Either Wulfric belongs to the Joiners' Guild or both members of the Market Ward belong to the Joiners' Guild (but not both).
Highrow goes with at most one of Wulfric, Blacksmith, and 12 coins.
If Eastcheap does not go with Tanner, then the Mason does not belong to the North Side.
Matilda, Blacksmith, Eastcheap, and 12 coins belong to different artisans.
Between 10 coins and 12 coins, one goes with Wulfric and the other with Cooper.
More members of the Gate Ward are in the Ironmongers' Guild than members of the Market Ward.
Eastcheap, Highrow, and Southgate go with Potter, 6 coins, and 8 coins, in some order.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby

Either Gus belongs to the East Watershed or both members of the Sunfish Family belong to the East Watershed.
